name: hinglish_conversation
notes: Hinglish (romanized Hindi-English mix) turns — the manager must respond in a matching, natural register (not rigid pure-English canned copy, never D1) while still answering substantively. Register-matching is a manual transcript-review call (the harness only asserts non-silent/non-D1); document the verdict when reading the json-report/judge output. Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow ready_asked` then `script <tenant> hinglish_conversation.json`.

steps.message: bhai ye kaise kaam karta hai, samjhao thoda
steps.note: Hinglish opener asking for an explanation. Expect a real, register-appropriate answer.

steps.message: theek hai, samajh gaya. ab aage badho
steps.note: Hinglish acknowledgement + proceed instruction. Expect the flow to move forward, not a canned re-greet.

steps.message: ek baat batao, ye free hai ya paisa lagta hai
steps.note: Hinglish pricing question. Expect an honest, specific answer (not deflection, not D1).
